Description.value: Unifies vanilla T1, EZS T2-T5, and Bloodfall T6-T15 zombies into a single 15-tier curve driven by player GameStage. Single Harmony Prefix on EntityFactory.CreateEntity(EntityCreationData) — the chokepoint every entity creation funnels through, including chunk restore from region save files. Covers spawn, WalkerSim cached agents, and persistent world entities in one hook.
